//: A+ domain.7 — strict typecheck for the domain kernel ONLY.
The domain (src/domain/**) is the pure data-in/data-out kernel every other
layer trusts, and the layer best positioned to be strict (no React/JSX/DOM).
With strict:false the baseline lets every un-annotated param be `any`, so a
JSDoc @param that lies or a shape drift compiles clean. This config turns
strict + noImplicitAny ON over the domain so those become gate errors.
`npm run typecheck:domain:strict` runs this and is wired into `npm run check`.
It extends the baseline (compiler options + the src/domain include) and only
